productDisplayName: Asics Men's Sport White Blue Gel Cushioning Shoe
description: CompositionWhite and blue lightweight running shoes with open mesh upper, Trusstic sole unit, GEL Cushioning system and high abrasion rubber outsole with AHAR Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlightFittingRegularThis pair of shoes from asics offers your feet that much needed support from heel strike to toe-off. The trusstic system links the rearfoot and forefoot and shores the midfoot, while the rear foot cushioning attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.  High abrasion rubber(AHAR) placed in critical areas of the outsole means exceptional durability, while the mesh upper allows the feet to breathe comfortably, making it a perfect urban footwear.
